heading: The Kids Who Inspire Us
subheading: Every room starts with a dream. These are the children who remind us why we do what we do.

kids.name: Amari

kids.blurb: They call Emery their ray of sunshine. She radiates joy, is extremely determined and spunky, loves music, spinning, and is always up for an adventure. Her…
